name: Meru County Stormwater Plan
notes: World Bank urban resilience grant funded plan 2021. Not adopted. County engineering department lacks staff to implement without external support.

name: Kathita River Riparian Enforcement
blocking_factor: Dense settlement on riparian land — enforcement would displace 2
column12: Buffer mapped. County has not issued any enforcement orders. Structures built within buffer 2019-2023 approved by county planning.

name: Mt Kenya NE Catchment Protection
blocking_factor: Encroachment from smallholder agriculture and miraa cultivation
column12: 000 ha protected. Miraa (khat) cultivation on forest margins continues. Economic value of miraa makes enforcement politically costly.

name: Meru Town Drainage Upgrade
notes: Phase 1 procurement failed 2022. Retendered 2023. Award delayed.

name: Tana-Kathita Early Warning Integration
blocking_factor: Last-mile alert to Nkubu not operational
notes: 3 gauges functional. Meru Town 3-hour warning achievable. Nkubu alert chain not established.
